decision_title: AI interpretation run creates one background task
evidence_quotes: Each AI interpretation run creates one task, which runs in the background in the task list (similar to how the CC platform operates)

decision_title: Notification sent upon AI interpretation task completion
evidence_quotes: a notification is sent when it completes

decision_title: AI interpretation notification mechanism details pending confirmation
evidence_quotes: Notification mechanism details are pending confirmation in the requirements interview

decision_title: Two image sources for AI interpretation
evidence_quotes: Two image sources: a one-time large-scale nationwide batch of imagery obtained from Vendor A, or individual images uploaded by the user

decision_title: User confirms suspected points after AI interpretation
evidence_quotes: After interpretation completes, a list is generated; the user can confirm suspected points (yes/no)

decision_title: User decides to place suspected points under monitoring
evidence_quotes: and decide whether to place them under watch/monitoring

decision_title: Monitoring requires reason and polygon upload
evidence_quotes: When placing a point under monitoring, the reason must be filled in and a polygon uploaded

decision_title: Large-area polygons are valid for monitoring
evidence_quotes: (large-area polygons are valid; overly small areas are automatically filtered out)

decision_title: Overly small polygons automatically filtered out for monitoring
evidence_quotes: (large-area polygons are valid; overly small areas are automatically filtered out)

decision_title: Image upload duplicate-prevention mechanism needed
evidence_quotes: Images must not be uploaded more than once (image files are large, so a duplicate-prevention mechanism is needed)

decision_title: Two-period image comparison will no longer pull from image library
evidence_quotes: Two-period image comparison will no longer pull from the image library

decision_title: User will manually annotate for two-period image comparison
evidence_quotes: the user will annotate this manually instead

decision_title: On-site workstation setup for image comparison model
evidence_quotes: A workstation will be set up on-site

decision_title: Client's AP calls workstation to run model
evidence_quotes: images are sent to the client's AP, which then calls the workstation to run the model

decision_title: Base map provided by GIS Provider B via GeoServer
evidence_quotes: The base map will be provided by GIS Provider B via GeoServer

decision_title: Map viewer loads historically uploaded imagery
evidence_quotes: The map viewer can load historically uploaded imagery

decision_title: Map viewer filters list by date
evidence_quotes: supports filtering the list by date and image-name keyword

decision_title: Map viewer filters list by image-name keyword
evidence_quotes: supports filtering the list by date and image-name keyword

decision_title: Map viewer filters list by image type (satellite, aerial photo, drone)
evidence_quotes: (type: satellite / aerial photo / drone)

decision_title: Map viewer displays points on the map
evidence_quotes: and displays points on the map

decision_title: Locate button for points on map
evidence_quotes: Opening a point shows a "locate" button

decision_title: Map zooms to location when 'locate' button pressed
evidence_quotes: the map automatically zooms to that location

decision_title: Imagery reverts to point display when zoomed out past scale
evidence_quotes: When the map is zoomed out past a certain scale, imagery automatically reverts to point display

decision_title: Map view locked and not pannable in comparison mode
evidence_quotes: In comparison mode, the map view is locked and cannot be panned

decision_title: Release drag mode button to restore panning
evidence_quotes: a "release drag mode" button is provided to restore panning

decision_title: Users can adjust image transparency
evidence_quotes: Users can adjust image transparency (an important feature for orthophoto analysis)

decision_title: Map viewer design references Forest Land Disaster Prevention System
evidence_quotes: The map viewer's design references the existing Forest Land Disaster Prevention System

decision_title: Projects organized by year
evidence_quotes: Projects are organized by year

decision_title: Suspected points created within a project
evidence_quotes: suspected points can be created within a project

decision_title: Decision on splitting suspected point layers by county/city pending
evidence_quotes: Whether to split layers by county/city is pending confirmation in the requirements interview

decision_title: Suspected points require uploaded polygon
evidence_quotes: Suspected points require an uploaded polygon

decision_title: No image upload needed for suspected points
evidence_quotes: no image upload is needed

decision_title: Each year forms one layer for suspected points
evidence_quotes: Each year forms one layer

decision_title: New Survey Point Data interface needed
evidence_quotes: Need to add a "New Survey Point Data" interface

decision_title: New Survey Point Data interface includes drawing number field
evidence_quotes: (including drawing number and key-monitoring-zone fields, refer to manual figure 2.13)

decision_title: New Survey Point Data interface includes key-monitoring-zone field
evidence_quotes: (including drawing number and key-monitoring-zone fields, refer to manual figure 2.13)

decision_title: New Survey Point Data interface fields defined
evidence_quotes: [Screenshot: "New Survey Point Data" form, before/after clicking "Edit" — fields include survey serial number, drawing number, key monitoring zone, village, monitoring date, monitoring method (precise coordinates / aerial survey / rapid monitoring / unmanned equipment), volume (cubic meters), area (square meters), section, lot number, X/Y coordinates, longitude/latitude, approximate location]

decision_title: Legacy MS file management system to be migrated
evidence_quotes: The original MS file management system will be migrated to the new system

decision_title: Migrated system interface to be redesigned
evidence_quotes: the interface will be redesigned

decision_title: Migrated system functionality to remain unchanged
evidence_quotes: but functionality will remain unchanged

decision_title: Migration driven by information-security compliance
evidence_quotes: The main reason for migration is information-security compliance requirements

decision_title: Migration details pending confirmation
evidence_quotes: Migration details are pending confirmation in the requirements interview

decision_title: Legacy system has email-based follow-up/reminder feature
evidence_quotes: The legacy system already has a follow-up/reminder feature, primarily via email notification

decision_title: Follow-up items selectable from suspected points
evidence_quotes: Items to follow up on can be selected from suspected points and integrated into the follow-up module

decision_title: Add schedule-tracking interface to follow-up module
evidence_quotes: Add a schedule-tracking interface (e.g. showing days remaining)

decision_title: Add follow-up dispatch interface
evidence_quotes: Follow-up dispatch interface (Shao-Chien already has a first draft)

decision_title: Follow-up connects to survey-report management
evidence_quotes: After follow-up, this connects to survey-report management

decision_title: Survey-report management includes specific fields
evidence_quotes: including time, description, action taken, and uploaded images

decision_title: Data-flow document explaining post-AI interpretation data requested by A-Bao
evidence_quotes: A-Bao needs a data-flow document explaining how data moves after AI interpretation completes — where the data is pulled from, and where computation happens

decision_title: High-level data flow defined for documentation
evidence_quotes: Data flow covers: image source → interpretation task execution (workstation) → result output → monitoring database

decision_title: Project currently in bidding process
evidence_quotes: The project is currently in the bidding process

decision_title: Project expected to kick off mid-May if bidding successful
evidence_quotes: if things go smoothly, it's expected to kick off in mid-May

decision_title: Immediate requirements interview and interface confirmation after bid award
evidence_quotes: On the afternoon of the day the bid is awarded, a requirements interview and interface confirmation may need to happen immediately

evidence_quotes: Sherry | Finish the "add suspected point" data interface (refer to figure 2.13) | Before 5/18

evidence_quotes: Sherry | Organize existing interfaces (including the parts Shao-Chien owns) for use in the requirements interview | Before 5/20

evidence_quotes: Sherry | Prepare the data-flow document (image source, compute node, data direction) for A-Bao to review | Before 5/18
